hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) cd /vmpool/github/stronghold && python3 -m ruff check "$f" 2>&1 | head -15; RC1=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; python3 -m ruff format --check "$f" 2>&1 | head -5; RC2=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; if [ $RC1 -ne 0 ] || [ $RC2 -ne 0 ]; then echo '---'; echo 'Auto-fix: ruff check --fix '"$f"' && ruff format '"$f"; fi;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */src/stronghold/*.py) cd /vmpool/github/stronghold && python3 -m mypy "$f" --strict --no-error-summary 2>&1 | grep -E 'error:' | head -10;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */tests/test_*.py|*/tests/*/test_*.py) cd /vmpool/github/stronghold && python3 -m pytest "$f" -x -q --tb=short --no-header 2>&1 | tail -15;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */src/stronghold/*.py) if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then MODULE=$(echo "$f" | sed 's|.*/src/stronghold/||; s|/|.|g; s|\.py$||; s|\.__init__$||'); if ! grep -qi "$MODULE\|$(basename "$f" .py)" /vmpool/github/stronghold/ARCHITECTURE.md 2>/dev/null; then echo "{\"decision\":\"warn\",\"reason\":\"New module '$MODULE' not found in ARCHITECTURE.md. Build rule: No Code Without Architecture. Run /guard $MODULE first.\"}"; fi; fi;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */src/stronghold/*.py) if echo "$CLAUDE_TASK_CONTEXT" | grep -qi 'test\|coverage' 2>/dev/null; then echo "{\"decision\":\"warn\",\"reason\":\"You are editing production code ($f) during a testing task. Build rule: Never modify production code when writing tests.\"}"; fi;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
